per_episode.task_description: Pick up the brown pinecone keychain with charm and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the sleek slim dark phone with camera and place it in or on the round dark stone bowl
Pick up the blue remote and place it in or on the textured ceramic rustic bowl
Pick up the instrumentality and place it in or on the cooking utensil
Pick up the remote control and place it in or on the rustic round gray clay bowl
Pick up the butterknife and place it in or on the dark speckled bowl
Pick up the green tissue box rectangular and place it in or on the shallow glossy gray ceramic bowl
Pick up the curved hunting knife with handle and place it in or on the round gray bowl
Pick up the golden brown crescent shaped croissant and place it in or on the shallow bowl with rim
Pick up the blue rectangular alarm clock and place it in or on the white bowl with ducks
